title: Plum Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry made with plums, vegetables, and a hint of sweetness. Perfect as a side dish or a quick snack.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced plums and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to soften.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and honey until well combined.
Pour the sauce over the plum and vegetable mixture, and stir to coat.
